framework.name: ChatGPT Enterprise Pricing ($60/user/month)
framework.description: ChatGPT Enterprise costs $60 per user per month, Microsoft Copilot $30/user/month, Claude Enterprise custom pricing. This provides willingness-to-pay benchmarks for general AI platforms but not for specific bottleneck solutions.
framework.raw_quote: ChatGPT Enterprise: $60 [per user/month], Microsoft Copilot: $30, Claude Enterprise: Custom

source.title: Enterprise AI Adoption Strategy: Complete 2025 Guide
